'''''Jitte''''' was an [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] under the command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]].

==History==
It carried [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] that were modified to carry shield generators. It attempted to destroy a [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] research and development facility, but it was destroyed by [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transports]] under escort of [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' mistakenly identifies the ''Jitte'' as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] escort carrier.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
